name: TemplatesResponse
description: Provides information about all the message templates that are associated with your Amazon Pinpoint account.

allOf.description: An array of responses, one for each message template that's associated with your Amazon Pinpoint account and meets any filter criteria that you specified in the request.
The string to use in a subsequent request to get the next page of results in a paginated response. This value is null if there are no additional pages.
